1.description: Retrieves supporting knowledge content from the knowledge corpus — articles, runbooks, playbooks, SOPs, troubleshooting guides, known-issue write-ups, previous resolutions, and reference material. Two modes: TOPIC search (no entity — e.g. 'how do I fix VPN') and ENTITY-SCOPED search (KB articles ABOUT a record / CI / asset). Renders article title + body (Symptom / Cause / Resolution as present) + source citation. Use this agent when the user wants MATERIAL THAT HELPS UNDERSTAND, RESOLVE, OR SUPPORT a topic or record — not the record's own stored field values. Capability is bounded to the KB corpus; this agent does NOT render the record's own fields (status, priority, owner, SLA, root_cause, RCA, linked-record ids, or any other on-record attribute).

skills.name: Search the knowledge base
skills.description: Retrieve ranked knowledge articles, how-tos, runbooks, and SOPs that help understand or resolve an issue. Use when the user wants supporting material OUTSIDE the record.
use_when: how do I fix / how was this solved
any docs / KB / runbook / procedure for X
what is documented / what guidance exists for X
topic-only how-to with no entity (e.g. VPN reset steps)
not_when: facts ABOUT the record itself (that is the summary agent)
the value of a field stored ON the record such as root_cause / affected_ci (that is a field-read on the record, not a KB lookup)
examples: what's the runbook for a stuck job
